text:
currently the entry load is no longer permitted. 
Exit load is a fee or charge imposed on investors by a mutual fund when investors redeem/sell 
their units before a specified period. The purpose of exit load is to discourage short-term trading 
and to protect long-term investors from the potential adverse effects of short-term trading 
activities. 
The information about the load structure can be found in mutual fund’s offer document or scheme
